description: Implement merge_intervals(intervals: list[tuple[int, int]]) -> list[tuple[int, int]]. Each interval is (start, end) inclusive. Merge all overlapping or adjacent intervals and return the result sorted by start. Two intervals are adjacent if one ends exactly where the other begins (e.g. (1,3) and (3,5) should merge to (1,5)). Return [] for empty input.
